meta.title: Products We Export | AWSoversea
meta.description: AWSoversea handles export logistics for food grains, fabrics and readymade garments, leather footwear, steel utensils, tractors, pharmaceuticals, medical equipment, industrial chemicals, activated carbon, spices, and furniture — sourced, packed, and shipped worldwide.

hero.title: Products We Move Across Borders
hero.subtitle: From grain silos to garment floors, tanneries to tractor yards — AWSoversea handles export logistics for eleven commodity classes, each with its own packing, documentation, and compliance requirements. This is what we ship, and how we ship it.

overview.title: Eleven Commodities, One Export Desk
overview.description: Every commodity class on this schedule carries different rules — cold-chain for medicines, fumigation certificates for grains, hazmat declarations for chemicals, HS codes that determine duty at the other end. Our commodity desk builds the shipping plan around the product, not the other way around.

productsGrid.title: Export Schedule
productsGrid.description: Every commodity class we currently move, with handling notes for the ones that need them.

foodGrains.title: Food Grains
foodGrains.description: Bulk and bagged export of rice, wheat, pulses, and other staple grains, moved in fumigated, moisture-controlled containers with full phytosanitary documentation so cargo clears agricultural inspection at the destination port without delay.

garments.title: Fabric & Readymade Garments
garments.description: End-to-end export handling for textile rolls and finished apparel — from carton and hanger-pack consolidation to labeling compliance for the destination market's retail and customs requirements.

leatherFootwear.title: Leather Footwear
leatherFootwear.description: Export logistics for finished leather shoes and components, with humidity-controlled packing and the material declarations that leather goods require for customs clearance in regulated markets.

steelUtensils.title: Steel & SS Utensils
steelUtensils.description: Bulk export of stainless steel and steel kitchenware and household utensils, palletized and shrink-wrapped to survive long transit without denting, scratching, or shifting inside the container.

tractors.title: Tractors
tractors.description: Heavy machinery export for tractors and agricultural equipment, including RO-RO and flat-rack container booking, pre-shipment inspection coordination, and the certificates of conformity destination customs authorities require.

medicines.title: Medicines
medicines.description: Temperature-controlled pharmaceutical export with cold-chain monitoring from warehouse to destination, backed by the batch documentation and regulatory paperwork health authorities require to release the shipment.

medicalEquipment.title: Syringes & Medical Equipment
medicalEquipment.description: Secure, sterile-integrity export packing for syringes, diagnostic devices, and medical equipment, with the CE/ISO conformity paperwork and fragile-handling protocols this category depends on.

chemicals.title: Chemicals (Hazardous & Non-Hazardous)
chemicals.description: IMDG-compliant export of hazardous and non-hazardous industrial chemicals, handled by our dangerous-goods desk from UN classification and MSDS paperwork through to segregation-compliant container stowage.

activatedCarbon.title: Activated Carbon
activatedCarbon.description: Bulk export of activated carbon for water treatment, industrial, and filtration use, packed in moisture-sealed bags and liners to protect adsorption quality across long ocean transit.

spices.title: Spices
spices.description: Export of whole and processed spices under food-safety-compliant packing, with the fumigation, lab-testing, and phytosanitary certificates that spice shipments need to clear import food-safety checks.

furniture.title: Furniture
furniture.description: Export packing and freight for wooden, metal, and upholstered furniture, using knock-down crating and ISPM-15 compliant wood treatment to keep volume and damage risk down over long-haul shipping.

cta.title: Exporting Something Not on This List?
cta.description: This schedule covers what we ship most — but our commodity desk builds custom export plans for other product categories too. Tell us what you're moving and where, and we'll quote it.
